title: Command Adapter Contract Closeout
summary: #358 added a schema-validated command-adapter generation contract for the root `defaults` command. #359 remains open for the first generated adapter implementation, and #364 records the validated-contract parity friction found while dogfooding.

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Define the canonical command adapter generation contract
[Workspace]: Generate shipped CLI adapters from authoritative package definitions
issue_classifications.evidence: #358 established the contract; #359 remains open for generated adapter implementation.

issue_classifications.title: [Review]: Derive validated contract-consumption parity from declared loader use
issue_classifications.evidence: Dogfooding #358 required updating both python_contract_consumption.json and a hard-coded parity set in scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py.
